name: Denied comp in Boise for 'not serious enough', appeal options?

mainEntity.name: Denied comp in Boise for 'not serious enough', appeal options?

acceptedAnswer.text: Appeal to Industrial Commission with lawyer/evidence.[2][3]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, request hearing with Idaho Industrial Commission; present more evidence.[2] Deadlines strict.[2] Key factors: medical proof of disability; lawyer represents at hearing.[3] File appeal fast, strengthen records, avoid pro se pitfalls.[2] High reversal rate with counsel.

description: Appeal to Industrial Commission with lawyer/evidence.[2][3]
